backend/main.mo: Main actor for the AI Media Studio backend, handling user profiles, image/video generation via HTTP outcalls, gallery storage, Stripe payment integration, and role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (which included credit balances and generation cost fields) into the new actor state by dropping those fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all frontend credit-gate checks have been removed, ensuring the Generate button is always enabled regardless of credit balance.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'AI Media Studio', with Google Fonts preconnect and a root div for the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in a forced dark ThemeProvider, sets up TanStack Router, and renders a styled Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied screen displayed to non-admin users, with a descriptive message and a back-to-home navigation button.
frontend/src/components/GalleryCard.tsx: Gallery card component that renders an image or video preview with hover effects, a type badge, and an external link to the media URL.
frontend/src/components/GenerationTab.ts: Reusable generation tab component for image or video creation with a prompt textarea, status indicator, and an always-enabled Generate button with no credit-gating logic.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component that renders a sticky header with navigation links, logo, user credits display, login/logout controls, and a mobile menu, conditionally showing links based on authentication and admin status.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter a display name to create their profile, submitting it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that shows a loading spinner while initializing, or a login prompt if unauthenticated, and renders children only when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/StripeConfigSetu: Admin form component for configuring Stripe payments by entering a secret key and managing a list of allowed country codes, showing a success badge if Stripe is already configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profile, credits, image/video generation, gallery retrieval, admin operations, and Stripe configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines dark-first CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens, glass/glow utility classes) for the app's design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin-only page that displays user stats and a table for managing user credit balances, with access control via useIsCallerAdmin and a Stripe config setup section.
frontend/src/pages/CreditsPage.tsx: Credits purchase page showing the user's current balance and three credit bundle options that initiate a Stripe checkout session on selection.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Protected gallery page that fetches and displays the user's AI-generated media in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons and an empty state prompt.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratePage.tsx: Protected media generation page with image and video tabs, displaying the user's credit balance and delegating generation logic to the GenerationTab component.
frontend/src/pages/IndexPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero banner, feature highlights, and CTA buttons that route authenticated users to generation or prompt unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure page with an error icon, message, and buttons to retry payment or return to home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a payment success page that invalidates the credits query cache and provides buttons to start generating or view credit balance.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the TanStack Router route tree, mapping all app paths (home, generate, gallery, admin, credits, payment success/failure) to their page components under a shared Layout root.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH color tokens (cyan, emerald, amber, surface), extended border radii, glow box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 7) for a full-stack ICP AI media generation app, listing existing features, architectural notes, and known issues.
